title: cistus × ledon var. recognitus
intro: Cistus × ledon var. recognitus, also known as the Rock Rose or Maritime Cistus, is a hybrid plant species within the Cistus genus. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include wound healing, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Cistus × ledon var. recognitus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
